items.title: Amgen Strikes Drug Pricing Deal With Trump: What Investors Should Know
items.description: AMGN signs a pricing deal with the Trump administration, cutting U.S. drug costs, expanding DTC access and securing tariff relief tied to domestic investment.

items.title: Eli Lilly: Mr. Market Finally Woke Up, But I'm Not Out Yet (Rating Downgrade)
items.description: Eli Lilly hiked its revenue growth guidance by 7%, while Novo Nordisk was forced to slash its targets by ~12%. See why I'm still bullish on LLY stock.
